hero.subtitle: ABOUT US
hero.title: Exceptional Dental Care for Your Entire Family
hero.description: Learn about our commitment to providing high-quality dental care in a comfortable and welcoming environment.

welcome.subtitle: WELCOME TO DENTCARE
welcome.title: Modern Dental Care with a Personal Touch
welcome.description: At DentCare, we combine advanced technology with compassionate care to provide exceptional dental services. Our commitment to excellence ensures that every patient receives personalized attention and the highest quality treatment.

features.title: Preventive Dentistry
features.description: Regular check-ups and cleanings to maintain your oral health and prevent future dental problems.

features.title: Emergency Dental Care
features.description: 24/7 emergency dental services when you need them most, with quick response and effective treatment.

team.subtitle: OUR TEAM
team.title: Meet Our Expert Dental Professionals
team.description: Our team of experienced dentists and dental professionals is dedicated to providing the highest quality care for you and your family. With advanced training and a commitment to continuing education, we stay at the forefront of modern dentistry.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.description: Discover firsthand experiences from our satisfied patients who have received exceptional dental care at DentCare.

items.content: The team at DentCare is exceptional. They made my dental experience comfortable and stress-free. The results of my treatment exceeded my expectations!
items.name: Sarah Thompson

items.content: I've never felt more at ease at a dental office. The staff is friendly, professional, and truly cares about patient comfort. Highly recommend!
items.name: Michael Chen
